name: 綁架對峙＋捨身救人
description: 蘇雲持刀挾持容百根，女主衝上去擋刀保護家人，男主和警方同時到場收網。多方勢力匯聚在同一空間的對峙場面。
tags: 人質危機的生死壓力、正邪最終對決的視覺衝擊

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Fine, I'll let him go. Unless you hand over the entire Rome Corporation to me... Sister-in-law. I'm coming to help you. Don't get in the way. I'll kill you. Look out... Su Yun, you're under arrest for kidnapping and financial fraud.
examples.context: 人質危機的生死壓力、正邪最終對決的視覺衝擊
